Story.Name: Mod_trib_story_demonblood
Story.Desc: Following the map found inside the Nameless Demonic Journal, [NAME] found the abandonned residence of an ancient cultivator near the Village of Dunes. Maybe something of value could be found inside.

li.OKResult: me:AddMsg(XT("After thinking about it, [NAME] decided not to take any risk and left."));
